root_cause_evidence.exact_kv_audit: Across all 504 FP32 panel-by-layer records, fused candidate K/V and collapsed K/V were elementwise equal to native parent K/V; all reconstructed packed records were parent-equivalent.
root_cause_evidence.control_isolation: C_post, replicated-atoms and collapse-bypass final logits are exactly equal in FP32 and BF16. The remaining FP32 deviation is isolated to the hierarchical execution order after exact parent-equivalent K/V, not to candidate fusion, prior normalization or masking.
root_cause_evidence.host_sync: P2-P5 hot-path and scientific-scope synchronization counts are zero. P6 reports four non-hot scientific boundary events and does not change the hot-path verdict.
root_cause_evidence.prospective_only_inference: A future revision may test computing the shared parent eager adapter before any hierarchical atom/group kernels so the exact-equivalent branch has the same numerical call order as C_post. This was not patched or tested in the terminal R2f execution.

claim_boundary: R2f validates the hierarchical beta/gamma path, exact structural controls, forced-on engineering activation, resource gates and hot-path synchronization removal. It fails the frozen checkpoint-native numerical-null gate by 2.91534423828125e-06 in FP32. No matched-training or performance evidence exists.
